title: AJ's Mod Of Everything
description: A mod I made when i was seven lol.. Adds A BUNCH Of Stuff!
body:
This Mod... Boy Oh Boy.. We Have A LOT To Cover.

**First Lets Go Over My Favorite Items:**

- micro plastics

- bread sticks from olive garden

- raspberries

- blue

- salad 

- hotdog

- mountain dew

- microchip

- big mac

**And Now My Favorite Blocks:**

- mountain dew ore 

- the U I 3 4 block

- bomb ore 

- telepizer

- block of bomb

- rick roll

- frying pan

**And Now My Favorite Entities:**  

- mouse 

- hot dog man

- air

- oooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo

- creeper inposter

- uoi

- demon

- man

- bacteria

**And Now My Favorite Dimensions:**

- mars

- dark
